item.title: ‘It’s an expensive piece of equipment’: My neighbor asked to borrow my snowblower. Do I say yes?
item.description: Heavy snowfall rates of 2-3 inches per hour and gusty winds of 40-70 miles per hour hit the Northeast on Monday.

item.title: ‘I spend $7,500 a month’: I’m 47, earn $260K, and have $3 million. Can I retire at 50?
item.description: “I own a home worth $520,000 and do not have a mortgage on it.”

item.title: Tariff ruling sparks ‘refund chaos’ that small businesses and families can’t afford
item.description: Employers and workers need a stable, predictable U.S. trade policy.

item.title: Here are Trump’s affordability proposals — and where they stand
item.description: President Donald Trump is likely to tackle the elevated cost of living in his State of the Union address on Tuesday night. Here’s a look at what he ha...

item.title: ‘I found out too late’: My stepmother cheated me out of $500K from my father’s estate. What can I do?
item.description: “Within a week or two after the deadline to contest the will expired, my stepmother sent me an email stating she would not share anything.”
